notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-Q MD&A (accession 0001546417-25-000103, filed 2025-05-08), part 1 of 2; no fiscal_kpis in this chunk.
All evidence quotes verified verbatim (substring-checked) against the event content, including table rows for brand-level comparable sales and traffic.
Brand-level same_store_sales coined per ontology R9 (brand metric = own driver, separate from company-wide same_store_sales).

Skipped as vague/bare-category boilerplate (8): industry competition, government regulation/tax-law compliance, sustainability reporting, seasonality alone, consumer tastes/dietary habits, litigation, public health alone, bare inflation (captured instead via commodity_cost/wage_rate states).
States kept out of names per R7: inflation -> state on commodity_cost/wage_rate; beat/decline/lowered never used; brazil_operations_sale named as reusable divestiture-class cause using source nouns.
